$schema-note: Suggested MCP servers for the CopilotKit A2UI hackathon starter. Hackers can opt-in by enabling these in their MCP-capable client (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.). The CopilotKit docs server gives AI assistants live access to the canonical documentation so they don't hallucinate APIs or version-specific behavior. Update server entries as canonical MCP servers ship.

copilotkit-docs.$comment: TODO: replace with the canonical CopilotKit docs MCP server once published. Until then, point at the public docs search via a generic HTTP fetch MCP or use the in-IDE docs lookup. Search: 'CopilotKit docs MCP server' on https://github.com/CopilotKit and https://docs.copilotkit.ai.
copilotkit-docs.description: Live search over CopilotKit + A2UI v0.9 documentation. Replaces hallucinated APIs with grounded answers.

a2ui-spec.$comment: Optional: A2UI v0.9 specification reference. Useful when authoring custom catalogs or debugging envelope shape errors. If a canonical server doesn't exist, leave disabled and reference https://a2ui.org/specification/v0.9-a2ui/ manually.
